title: Business Analyst
notes: Common first role for BBA graduates with analytics exposure. Demand is steady across markets.

title: Data Analyst
notes: Frequently a stepping stone to data science or analytics engineering. Remote-friendly.

title: BI Developer
notes: Ops-adjacent analytics role. Strong fit for graduates who like building reusable assets.

title: Marketing Manager
notes: Mid-career destination for digital marketing graduates with 3+ years of experience.

title: Growth Marketer
notes: Common in B2B SaaS and consumer subscription. Skills overlap heavily with analytics.

title: Content Strategist
notes: Good fit for graduates with strong writing and a marketing foundation.

title: FinTech Product Analyst
notes: Hybrid analyst-PM role; rapidly growing in payments and lending.

title: Payments Operations Analyst
notes: Common operational role at fintech and marketplaces.

title: Junior Investment Analyst
notes: Competitive entry; CFA Level I helps.

title: AI Product Manager
notes: MBA with AI concentration is a strong fit; experience with AI products is the limiting factor.

title: AI Strategy Lead
notes: Common in mid-to-large enterprises adopting AI; consulting backgrounds dominate today.

title: Head of Data
notes: Senior IC-to-leader role; usually 8+ years of experience.

title: Management Consultant
notes: Tier-1 firms competitive; boutique and regional firms very accessible.

title: General Manager
notes: Senior role typically reached 8-12 years post-MBA.

title: Associate Product Manager
notes: Common entry-level PM track at tech and SaaS companies.

title: Product Analyst
notes: Bridge role between analytics and product; strong growth into PM.
